description: _stack adapter for the shared _stack Codex inbox/worktree runner.

notes: _stack stays operator-only in this phase, so verification is centered on shared runner surfaces, docs, command entrypoints, and workspace metadata rather than app build tooling.
_stack is self-managed through the same runner path, but it must not expand into dev-level multi-repo dispatch or Fitness-specific deploy logic in this pass.
_stack worker runs must stamp stack_lock_digest from the root stack.lock.yaml and emit assignment, running status, completion status, and merge-request artifacts through the shared handoff flow.
Do not add automatic commit-triggered receipts; receipts remain lightweight and manual even when successful mutating tasks auto-commit.
_stack runtime policy defaults now live in ops/codex/repos/stack/config.toml so governed runs can resolve and receipt one explicit runtime-policy envelope before execution.

_stack also owns the canonical Atlas workspace writer execution class, which operates directly against an explicit ATLAS root with read-only default admission, lock enforcement, dirty-path preservation, exact staging, and manual-only push.

docsUpdateRules: If shared Codex runner behavior, _stack adapter inventory, or operator command surfaces change, keep README.md, docs/codex-orchestration.md, docs/dispatcher-protocol.md, and workspace.manifest.json aligned in the same change or immediately after.

If dispatcher handoff boundaries, worker artifact contracts, or pause/resume/merge expectations change, keep AGENTS.md, templates/child-task-handoff.md, and docs/runbooks/STACK-WORKER-FLOW.md aligned with the operator docs in the same change or immediately after.

Keep _stack focused on workflow commands, editor tasks, receipts scaffolding, queue drops, templates, and cross-repo operator docs; do not add dev-level multi-repo dispatcher logic, Fitness deploy changes, or automatic commit-triggered receipts from this adapter.
